buff.effect: When an enemy target with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> is inflicted with <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color>, dispels control states from all allies, restores Skill Points, immediately takes action, and grants Aha an extra turn (this turn will count as <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak></color> fixed Punchline points).\nIncreases Elation DMG dealt to all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.25%</unbreak></color> and Break DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.15%</unbreak></color>.

selectableBuff.effect: All allies' Elation DMG ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.15%</unbreak></color> of enemy target's All-Type RES. When an enemy target's "War Armor" or "Centirefined War Armor" are broken, gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>3</unbreak></color> Punchline points.
After an ally target uses their Ultimate, the CRIT DMG dealt by their Skill increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> turn(s).

Increases Follow-Up ATK and Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.5%</unbreak></color> against enemy targets in Weakness Broken state.

Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.1%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.15%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2</unbreak></color> turn(s).

Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.3%</unbreak></color>. Additionally increases the CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.3%</unbreak></color> for the 1st character in the team lineup and their memosprite.
Increases DoT dealt to enemy targets in the Weakness Broken state by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>0.3%</unbreak></color>.
